data.name: Breads
data.subtitle: Slow-risen and table-ready.
data.shortDescription: Slow-risen loaves, focaccia, and seasonal bakes made for the table.
data.description: From a crusty loaf for dinner to a tender focaccia for sharing, each bake is made in small batches with time, care, and uncomplicated ingredients.
data.customizationNote: Ask about flavours, quantities, and a bake that suits your table.

data.name: Cakes
data.subtitle: Made for celebrations.
data.shortDescription: Thoughtful celebration cakes with beautiful, unfussy finishes.
data.description: Celebration cakes should feel special without feeling overdone. Each is made to bring a delicious, personal touch to your gathering.
data.customizationNote: Share your date, serving size, and a little about the celebration.

data.name: Cookies
data.subtitle: Buttery favourites to share.
data.shortDescription: Buttery classics and playful seasonal boxes for gifting or sharing.
data.description: Comforting classics, seasonal details, and gift-ready boxes make these cookies an easy way to share something sweet.
data.customizationNote: Choose your favourites, add a note, or build a box for your occasion.

data.name: Custom orders
data.subtitle: Made for your occasion.
data.shortDescription: A little something made exactly for your occasion.
data.description: A custom order starts with the occasion and ends with a thoughtful detail that makes it feel like yours.
data.customizationNote: Tell us the occasion and we will explore a delicious fit.

data.name: Custom sewing
data.subtitle: Made to fit your life.
data.shortDescription: Made-to-order pieces that fit your life and your style.
data.description: Thoughtfully sewn pieces begin with a useful idea, a lovely fabric, and attention to the small details that make something feel personal.
data.customizationNote: Bring a fabric, an idea, or simply a need - we will find the right direction.

data.name: Gifts
data.subtitle: Personal and made to remember.
data.shortDescription: Personalized fabric creations made to be remembered.
data.description: The best gifts feel considered. These handmade pieces are created to mark a person, a milestone, or a simple moment of care.
data.customizationNote: Tell us who it is for and what you would love the piece to say.

data.name: Repairs & refreshes
data.subtitle: For pieces worth keeping.
data.shortDescription: Careful mending for the pieces worth keeping.
data.description: A favourite item can often have more life in it. Careful repair and refresh work helps useful, meaningful pieces stay in your everyday rotation.
data.customizationNote: Share a photo and a short note about the repair you have in mind.

data.name: Seasonal crafts
data.subtitle: Handmade warmth for the season.
data.shortDescription: Small batches of handmade warmth for every season.
data.description: Small seasonal details make a home and a gathering feel especially welcoming. These pieces are made in limited, thoughtful batches.
data.customizationNote: Ask what is currently in season or about a small custom batch.
